_comment: FROZEN knowledge-mode eval suite. Do not edit casually — changing the ruler invalidates comparisons (PROJECT.md §9). Questions are answerable only from the indexed corpus (Project.md, myNotes.md, README.md).

tasks.question: According to my notes, what is the binding limit of the project — is it the 36 GB of RAM?
What are the hard, non-negotiable constraints of Atelier?
What are the two capability modes the agent has, and what verifies each?
Name two explicit non-goals of the project.
Which embedding model does Atelier use and on what device?
Roughly how much memory does a 13B-14B parameter model need according to my notes table?
What is the role of the fine-tuned small model in the project?
Why is running everything locally treated as a feature, not just a constraint?
